DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MARIA ORANTES MOTION TO COMPEL TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQ FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCS. THE MOVING PARTY HAS WITHDRAWN THE MOTION AS TO ALL RFPDS EXCEPT NOS. 1, 2, 10, 22 AND 23. AS TO NOS. 1, 10, 22, AND 23, THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE A SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSE STATING THAT ALL NON-PRIVILEGED DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRODUCED. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD ON PRIVILEGE SHALL BE PLACED ON A PRIVILEGE LOG. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO RFPD NO. 2 BASED ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS. SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO BE SERVED BY AUGUST 18, 2023. SANCTIONS DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

1 - PLAINTIFF MARIA ORANTES' Motion To Compel Deft Ccsf To Provide Further Responses To Interog

Off calendar. Motion withdrawn by the moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel To Provide Further Responses To Req For Production Of Docs
Off Calendar Jul-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - PLAINTIFF MARIA ORANTES Motion To Compel To Provide Further Responses To Req For Production Of Docs

The moving party has withdrawn the motion as to all RFPDs except Nos. 1, 2, 10, 22 and 23. As to Nos. 1, 10, 22, and 23, the motion is granted in part. Defendant shall provide a supplemental response stating that all non-privileged documents have been produced. Any documents withheld on privilege shall be placed on a privilege log. The motion is denied as to RFPD No. 2 based on Defendant's objections. Supplemental responses to be served by August 18, 2023. Sanctions denied.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem David McDonald at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Set For Trial On Apr-29-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
